title: duggena grisea
side_effects: Duggena grisea can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Additionally, the plant's toxic compounds can also cause headaches, fatigue, and respiratory problems in people with pre-existing respiratory conditions. Prolonged use or overuse of Duggena grisea can also lead to liver and kidney damage in some individuals.
